scripts.prepare-fixtures: rm -rf compositions assets fixtures/line/compositions fixtures/line/assets fixtures/points/compositions fixtures/points/assets && mkdir -p compositions fixtures/line/compositions fixtures/points/compositions && cp ../../compositions/data-chart.html ../../compositions/data-chart.motion.json compositions/ && cp -R ../../assets assets && cp compositions/data-chart.html compositions/data-chart.motion.json fixtures/line/compositions/ && cp compositions/data-chart.html compositions/data-chart.motion.json fixtures/points/compositions/ && cp -R assets fixtures/line/assets && cp -R assets fixtures/points/assets
scripts.check: npm run prepare-fixtures && for target in . fixtures/line fixtures/points; do echo ">>> $target"; npx --yes hyperframes@0.7.48 lint "$target" && npx --yes hyperframes@0.7.48 validate "$target" && npx --yes hyperframes@0.7.48 inspect "$target" --at 0.3,0.9,1.6,2.8,5.8 --strict || exit 1; done
scripts.snapshot: npm run prepare-fixtures && rm -rf snapshots && npx --yes hyperframes@0.7.48 snapshot --at 0.3,0.9,1.6,2.8,5.8
